title: ROSE HAVEN DAY CENTER - 211info
text: ROSE HAVEN ROSE HAVEN DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center that assists with food, showers, laundry facilities, clothing, hygiene items, diapers, pet food, and temporary mailing addresses. Advocates are available to help connect individuals to resources and provide emotional support. Outdoor gear provided when available. 1740 NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Women, transgender, non-binary, and gender-expansive adults and their minor children Hours: -Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-noon for shelter, services from 8:30am-11:30am -Tuesday/Thursday 8am-3:30pm for shelter, services from 8:30am-11:30am and 1pm-3:30pm -Wednesday 1pm-3:30pm for guests with minor children only Email (503) 248-6364 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 248-6364 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Walk in; limited intakes are first come, first served -No appointments -Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 24, 26, and 77; bus stops 1-2 blocks away Services: Bus Fare * Women Camping Gear * Women Community Meals * Women Diapers * Women Drop In Centers * Families with Children Drop In Centers * Women General Clothing Provision * Women Laundry Facilities * Women Personal/Grooming Supplies * Women Pet Food * Women Public Restrooms * Women Public Showers/Baths * Women Temporary Mailing Address * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSE HAVEN
